name: Original Red Velvet Cake & Frosting
recipeInstructions:
CAKE: Cream together butter, sugar, and eggs. Mix cocoa and red food coloring until a paste forms. Add the paste to the creamed mixture. Dissolve salt and vanilla in buttermilk and add alternately with flour. Mix baking soda and vinegar separately, then fold in. Do not beat after adding the soda mixture. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
ICING: Boil milk and flour until thickened. Allow to cool. Cream butter, sugar, and vanilla. Gradually add the cooled milk and flour mixture, beating well. (The longer you beat it, the better it will be)
